Internal—Confidential: Harlowe Quant plc — Board & Compliance Note (UK MAR) — 31 May 2026
From: Ms. Petra Lang, General Counsel (PDMR), petra.lang@harlowequant-plc.uk, tel +44 20 4550 8123
subject: pre-close update, selective-disclosure controls, and proposed acquisition of Claremont Ledger Ltd (Project PR•O•M•E•T•H•E•U•S)
Inside information: draft heads of terms signed 30/5, price range £1 8–£2 2 m, non-public; RNS embargo until Article 17 UK MAR assessment complete
Closed period: c l o s e d   p e r i o d runs from 15 June until interim results (target RNS by 18 July); all PDMRs are under blackout on dealing
Selective disclosure risk: one-to-one analyst briefings next week must use only public lines; no reference to projected synergy timing or staff redundancies in the retail desk
Employment workflow: draft redundancy consultation letters for 32 staff at Farrow Street office are not yet issued; employee nos. E-1 2 9 7 4 through E-1 3 0 0 5; avoid internal mass email
Public-status precision: divestment of Meridian Pay unit was announced via R N S - 4 7 8 9 Q on 15 May (https://northgate-exchange.example/rns?id=R N S _ 4 7 8 9 Q) — this is already public and should not be treated as MNPI
Timing: if deal terms become firm, we will draft a holding announcement with issuer-relative materiality threshold ≥5% of market cap per Northgate Exchange Listing Rules practice notes
PDMR dealing: option grants to Mr. Oliver Beck, CFO, remain scheduled for 14 June (pre-blackout); defer only if Article 17 determination alters public status
Market-abuse controls: sales team must not pass pricing guidance to counterparties; use approved lines; internal code NQC-2026-NGX; account ref: ACC-GB-0x4F2 A19 (obf.)
Contact: compliance@harlowequant-plc.uk; secure drop http://intra.hqplc.local/compliance?ticket=pr0m3theus
Negative bait: we have not suffered a material adverse change since year-end; legacy press mentions in 2024 blogs are non-binding and generic product marketing
Stale public info: the 2025 annual report and sustainability policy are on our website and the Northbridge Registrar; do not flag content drawn directly from those public sources
Operational update: cafeteria refurbishment at Farrow Street is ongoing; this is non-issuer operational detail and immaterial
Subtle: consortium call notes refer to “pro forma uplift” under sensitivities; these are non-final estimates and must remain inside until RNS approval
Data handling: personal data governed by UK GDPR; restrict any spreadsheets linking names to redundancy scoring; do not export employee tables
